label: Instructions
description:
# Model Family Documentation for CMIP7

## Purpose and Usage

This template documents **model families** that encompass multiple model configurations sharing common code bases. Model families are referenced in both EMD Model Properties and Component documentation, providing crucial lineage and relationship information.

**Why this matters:**
- Enables tracking of model evolution and relationships
- Documents shared scientific basis across model variants
- Supports understanding of model differences within families
- Facilitates component reuse tracking across institutions
- Required context for EMD model and component submissions

**Where this gets used:**
- Referenced by EMD Model Properties (Section 2)
- Referenced by EMD Component Properties (Section 3)
- Model lineage and evolution tracking systems
- Cross-institutional component sharing documentation
- Model intercomparison analysis and grouping
- Scientific literature model classification

**Examples of Model Families:** HadGEM3, CESM, ICON, MPI-ESM, CNRM-CM
**Examples of Component Families:** ECHAM, NEMO, JSBACH, CICE

## Instructions

Please fill out the following fields to document a **Model Family**. A family represents models or components that share much of their code bases but may be configured in different ways (e.g. different resolutions, parameter choices, or component inclusion).

label: Family Name
description: The name of the model family

label: Family Type
description: Is this a family of complete models or individual components?

label: Family Description
description:
Scientific and technical overview of the family including:

- Common scientific basis
- Shared code heritage
- What distinguishes this family
- What all family members have in common

label: Primary Reference DOI
description: DOI for the primary family reference
